system.notes:
Abilities

  • Give Me Your Best Shot: When hit by an attack that is not an AOE or spell attack, the gang leader can choose to lower their Defense Score against the attack to 1 to gain Leverage on their next attack against the target that attacked them.
  • Twist the Knife: If the gang leader damages a target with their machete, the target continues to bleed, taking 1P unresisted damage at the end of each Combat Turn. The target can spend a Complex Action to stem the blood flow and stop the ongoing damage. ORK GANGER

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Thermographic, Vision Magnification:
  • Mash the Trigger: The gang leader does not suffer
  • recoil penalties.:
